prompt:
I'm using color to show online/offline status. A colorblind user reported they can't tell the difference:

```swift
Circle().fill(isOnline ? .green : .red)
    .frame(width: 12, height: 12)
```

assertions.text: Identifies color-only indicator as accessibility failure (WCAG 1.4.1)
Adds shape and/or text alongside color (checkmark/xmark icons or text labels)
assertions.rationale: Skill shows color + shape + text pattern
